greeting: I've been expecting you. The water told me someone would come today.
Sit, child. You carry a burden heavier than you know.
The road brought you here for a reason. Nothing on this path is chance.
quest: Bring me three stones from the river — one white, one black, one red. With them I can read your fate, and perhaps... change it.
idle: The threads of fate tangle and untangle. All I do is watch.
The Grail is closer than anyone suspects. But not in the way they imagine.
